ideation: This sequence depicts a robot acknowledging 2nd place. It starts with arms down, moves to a brief, almost shy, hand-raising gesture, then settles into a slightly dejected but accepting pose.  The movement aims for a nuanced portrayal of mixed emotions, reflecting both the achievement and the near-miss of first place.  Frame 1 shows a neutral, slightly downcast starting position. Frame 2 shows a hesitant, almost shy, raising of both hands slightly forward. Frame 3 shows the robot acknowledging the achievement with a slightly lowered pose, suggesting acceptance of second place.

frames.beat: arms hang down, neutral and accepting
a slight, shy raising of both hands forward
settling into a dejected, second-place pose
